HomePage.title: Bistro Saimaa
HomePage.subtitle: Restaurant, event rooms, and catering
HomePage.description: Full-service restaurant in Ristiina: catering throughout Southern Savonia, event rooms for events and a beautiful location by Lake Saimaa.
HomePage.menuDescription: Explore our à la carte menu.
HomePage.lunchDescription: We offer a weekly changing lunch
HomePage.cateringDescription: Food and service either on-site in our event rooms or delivered elsewhere.
HomePage.heroLead: Restaurant, catering, and event spaces in the heart of Ristiina. We serve from morning to evening. Lunch, à la carte, and caterings across the Southern Savonia region.
HomePage.placeStripBody: Bistro Saimaa is a full-service restaurant in Ristiina. We also handle catering for events and celebrations across the Southern Savonia region — buffets, coffee service, and menus tailored to your needs.
HomePage.locationBody: We're located near Ristiina centre, close to Lake Saimaa. The restaurant includes event and sauna facilities for celebrations and gatherings. About 20 minutes' drive from Mikkeli.

MenuPage.title: Menu
MenuPage.subtitle: Explore our flavorful menu
MenuPage.instructionsDesktop: Use arrows to browse the menu

ContactPage.title: Contact Us
ContactPage.subtitle: Book an event room, order catering or ask for more information
ContactPage.emailTooltip: We prefer that you use the form on this page. It helps us sort contact messages and ensures a faster response.
ContactPage.locationDescription: Bistro Saimaa is located on the outskirts of Ristiina, only 20 minutes' drive from Mikkeli.
ContactPage.formDescription: Fill out the form below and we will get back to you as soon as possible.
ContactPage.formError: Failed to send message. Please try again.
ContactPage.urgentMatters: For urgent matters, we recommend calling our restaurant directly.
ContactPage.tableReservations: Table reservations are handled by phone.

validation.nameOnlyNumbers: Name cannot consist only of numbers
validation.privacyRequired: You must accept the privacy policy

PrivacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPage.intro: This privacy policy describes how Bistro Saimaa processes personal data collected through our contact form.
PrivacyPage.section1Intro: We collect the following information through the contact form:
PrivacyPage.section2Text: Collected data is used solely for customer communication, such as responding to inquiries, processing reservation requests, and organizing messages more clearly in email.
PrivacyPage.section3Item1: Is processed only by Bistro Saimaa staff
PrivacyPage.section3Item2: Is stored in our register (email) indefinitely unless deletion is requested
PrivacyPage.section3Item3: Is not shared with third parties for marketing or other purposes
PrivacyPage.section3Item4: Is not transferred outside the EU/EEA area
PrivacyPage.section3Item5: Message transmission is handled through Web3Forms service (web3forms.com)
PrivacyPage.section4Text: This website does not use cookies. The language (Finnish or English) is determined by the URL — no cookie or local storage entry is written.
PrivacyPage.section5Intro: We use Vercel Analytics to collect anonymous usage data about our website:
PrivacyPage.section5Item1: We collect anonymous data about visitor numbers and popular pages
PrivacyPage.section5Item2: Data is used to improve website usability and performance
PrivacyPage.section5Item3: We do not combine analytics data with personal information
PrivacyPage.section5Item4: Vercel Analytics does not use cookies and does not collect identifying user data
PrivacyPage.section5Item5: You can read more about Vercel Analytics privacy at:
PrivacyPage.section6Item1: Review what data we have collected about you, i.e., messages you have sent through the form
PrivacyPage.section6Item2: Request deletion of your data from our email
PrivacyPage.section6Text: You can exercise these rights by contacting us via email at bistrosaimaa@gmail.com.
